titleEn: Ahab Battles Assyrians at Qarqar allied w Ben-hadad
descriptionEn: The battle between the Assyrians and King Ahab in alliance with Benhadad happens at Qarqar on the Orontest in central Syria in Shalmaneser's 6th year. This very specific date provides an early synchronism between the Bible and secular history.

images.caption: King Ahab, Guillaume Rouille, "Promptuarii Iconum Insigniorum", 1553
